subject:
Re: Relion Bayesian Polish Error "There is no movie metadata STAR
 file for any micrograph"
body:
Hi,

I had the same problem, which was answered here:
https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/ASVwUuprLiQ

The last solution worked for me. Make sure your micrograph starfile points 
to the tifs, and not to the averages. It should do the trick.
Le mercredi 28 juillet 2021 à 21:00:47 UTC+2, cabezas...@gmail.com a écrit :

> Hello everyone. 
> I picked particles on WARP, exported the micrograph list, and when I try 
> to run Relion Bayesian Polishing, I get there following error; 
> " There is no movie metadata STAR file for any micrograph ".
> Attached is also an error screenshot from Relion.
>
> What data should be added to the exported micrograph list STAR file 
> generated by WARP that may solve this issue? 
>
> My exported micrograph list is also attached.
>
>
>
>
>
>
